Pinocchio2fits.py
Go to the documentation of this file.
1import numpy as np
2from astropy.io import fits
3import ReadPinocchio5 as rp
4import sys
5
6'''
7This script converts Pinocchio binary output to fits
8
9Usage: python3 Pinocchio2fits.py [pinocchio parameter file]
10'''
11
12VERSION='v5.0'
13CATALOGS=True
14PLC=True
15HISTORIES=True
16
17params={
18 'RunFlag' :[' ','string ','name of the run',''],
19 'OutputList' :[' ','string ','filename with required output redshifts',''],
20 'BoxSize' :[' ','int ','physical size of the box [Mpc or Mpc/h]',''],
21 'BoxInH100' :['False','bool ','specify that the box is in Mpc/h',''],
22 'GridSize' :[' ','int ','number of grid points per side',''],
23 'RandomSeed' :[' ','int ','random seed for initial conditions',''],
24 'FixedIC' :['False','bool ','modulus in ICs is fixed to the average',''],
25 'PairedIC' :['False','bool ','phase in ICs is shifted by PI',''],
26 'Omega0' :[' ','float ','Omega_0 (total matter)',''],
27 'OmegaLambda' :[' ','float ','Omega_Lambda',''],
28 'OmegaBaryon' :[' ','float ','Omega_b (baryonic matter)',''],
29 'Hubble100' :[' ','float ','little h',''],
30 'Sigma8' :[' ','float ','sigma8; if 0, it is computed from P(k)',''],
31 'PrimordialIndex' :[' ','float ','spectral index n_s',''],
32 'DEw0' :[' ','float ','w0 of dark energy EoS',''],
33 'DEwa' :[' ','float ','wa of dark energy EoS',''],
34 'TabulatedEoSfile' :[' ','string ','dark energy EoS tabulated in file',''],
35 'FileWithInputSpectrum' :[' ','string ','P(k) tabulated in file',''],
36 'InputSpectrum_UnitLength_in_cm' :[' ','float ','units of tabulated P(k) [cm]',''],
37 'WDM_PartMass_in_kev' :[' ','float ','WDM cut [keV]',''],
38 'BoundaryLayerFactor' :[' ','float ','width of boundary layer for fragmentation',''],
39 'MaxMem' :[' ','int ','max available memory to an MPI task [Mbyte]',''],
40 'MaxMemPerParticle' :[' ','int ','max available memory [bytes per particle]',''],
41 'PredPeakFactor' :[' ','float ','guess for the number of peaks in subvolume',''],
42 'CatalogInAscii' :['False','bool ','catalogs are written in ascii, not binary',''],
43 'OutputInH100' :['False','bool ','units are in H=100 instead of true H value',''],
44 'NumFiles' :[' ','int ','number of files for each catalog',''],
45 'MinHaloMass' :[' ','int ','smallest halo in output [particles]',''],
46 'AnalyticMassFunction' :[' ','int ','analytic mass function given in *.mf.out',''],
47 'WriteTimelessSnapshot' :['False','bool ','write timeless snapshot',''],
48 'DoNotWriteCatalogs' :['False','bool ','skip writing catalogs (including PLC)',''],
49 'DoNotWriteHistories' :['False','bool ','skip writing merger histories',''],
50 'StartingzForPLC' :[' ','float ','starting (highest) redshift for PLC',''],
51 'LastzForPLC' :[' ','float ','final (lowest) redshift for PLC',''],
52 'PLCAperture' :[' ','float ','cone aperture for PLC [deg]',''],
53 'PLCProvideConeData' :['False','bool ','read vertex and direction of cone',''],
54 'PLCCenter' :[' ','3 floats','cone vertex [same coordinates as BoxSize]',''],
55 'PLCAxis' :[' ','3 floats','un-normalized direction of cone axis',''],
56 'CTtableFile' :[' ','string ','filename with collapse time table to read in',''],
57 'CAMBMatterFileTag' :[' ','string ','label for CAMB matter power spectrum files',''],
58 'CAMBTransferFileTag' :[' ','string ','label for CAMB transfer function files',''],
59 'CAMBRunName' :[' ','string ','name of CAMB run',''],
60 'CAMBRedshiftsFile' :[' ','string ','list of redshifts of CAMB power spectra','']}
61
62
63def read_param_file(param_fname):
64
65
66 try:
67 f=open(param_fname)
68 except:
69 print(f'Error: parameter file {param_fname} not found')
70 return 1
71
72 print(f'Parameters in file: {param_fname}')
73
74 for line in f:
75
76 if line[0]=='#' or line[0]=='%':
77 continue
78
79 keys=line.split()
80
81 if len(keys)==0 or keys[0]=='%':
82 continue
83
84 if keys[0] not in params:
85 print(f"WARNING: unrecognized parameter, {keys[0]}")
86
87 else:
88
89 if params[keys[0]][0]=='False':
90 params[keys[0]][0]='True'
91 elif keys[0]=='PLCCenter' or keys[0]=='PLCAxis':
92 params[keys[0]][0]=keys[1]+' '+keys[2]+' '+keys[3]
93 else:
94 params[keys[0]][0]=keys[1]
95
96 f.close()
97
98 return 0
99
100
101def create_fits_file(output_file, column_data, column_names):
102
103 # Create a FITS binary table extension
104 columns = [fits.Column(name=col, format='D', array=np.array(data)) for col, data in zip(column_names, column_data)]
105 table = fits.BinTableHDU.from_columns(columns)
106
107 # Save the FITS file
108 table.writeto(output_file, overwrite=True)
109
110
111if len(sys.argv)<2:
112
113 print('Usage: python3 Pinocchio2fits.py [pinocchio parameter file]')
114 sys.exit(0)
115
116param_fname=sys.argv[1]
117
118if read_param_file(param_fname):
119 sys.exit(0)
120
121runflag=params['RunFlag'][0]
122print(f'RunFlag: {runflag}')
123
124output_fname=params['OutputList'][0]
125
126print(f'Output list in file: {output_fname}')
127
128try:
129 outputs=np.loadtxt(output_fname,unpack=True)
130except:
131 print(f'Error: outputs file {output_fname} not found')
132 sys.exit(0)
133
134print(f'Output list: {outputs}')
135
136def write_fits(fname,cat_type,cat):
137
138 print(f'Writing fits catalog {fname}')
139
140 primary_hdu = fits.PrimaryHDU()
141 primary_hdu.header.append(('CODE',f'Pinocchio {VERSION}','https://github.com/pigimonaco/Pinocchio'))
142 hdul = fits.HDUList([primary_hdu])
143 hdu = fits.BinTableHDU(cat.data)
144 hdu.name=cat_type
145 counter=1
146 hdu.header.append(('NHALOS',cat.Nhalos,'Number of halos in catalog'))
147 for key in params:
148 hdu.header.append((f'PAR{counter}',key,params[key][2]))
149 hdu.header.append((f'VAL{counter}',params[key][0],params[key][3]))
150 counter+=1
151 hdul.append(hdu)
152 hdul.writeto(fname, overwrite=True)
153
154 print(f'Writing done')
155
156
157def write_fits_histories(fname,cat):
158
159 print(f'Writing fits catalog {fname}')
160
161 primary_hdu = fits.PrimaryHDU()
162 primary_hdu.header.append(('CODE',f'Pinocchio {VERSION}','https://github.com/pigimonaco/Pinocchio'))
163 hdul = fits.HDUList([primary_hdu])
164 data = fits.BinTableHDU(cat.data)
165 myarr=np.empty((cat.Ntrees,),dtype=[('Nbranches', np.uint32), ('pointers', np.uint32)])
166 myarr['Nbranches']=cat.Nbranches
167 myarr['pointers']=cat.pointers
168 pointers = fits.BinTableHDU(myarr)
169 data.name='histories'
170 pointers.name='pointers'
171 counter=1
172 data.header.append(('NTREES',cat.Ntrees,'number of trees'))
173 data.header.append(('NBRANCH',cat.Nbranches_tot,'number of branches'))
174 for key in params:
175 data.header.append((f'PAR{counter}',key,params[key][2]))
176 data.header.append((f'VAL{counter}',params[key][0],params[key][3]))
177 counter+=1
178 pointers.header.append(('NTREES',cat.Ntrees,'number of trees'))
179 pointers.header.append(('NBRANCH',cat.Nbranches_tot,'number of branches'))
180 hdul.append(data)
181 hdul.append(pointers)
182 hdul.writeto(fname, overwrite=True)
183
184 print(f'Writing done')
185
186#
187# catalogs
188#
189
190if CATALOGS:
191 for z in outputs:
192
193 pin_fname=f'pinocchio.{z:6.4f}.{runflag}.catalog.out'
194 print(f'Reading catalog {pin_fname}')
195
196 cat=rp.catalog(pin_fname)
197
198 print(f'The catalog contains the following fields: {cat.data.dtype.names}')
199
200 fits_fname=pin_fname[:-3]+'fits'
201
202 write_fits(fits_fname,'catalog',cat)
203
204
205if PLC:
206 pin_fname=f'pinocchio.{runflag}.plc.out'
207 print(f'Reading catalog {pin_fname}')
208
209 cat=rp.plc(pin_fname)
210
211 print(f'The catalog contains the following fields: {cat.data.dtype.names}')
212
213 fits_fname=pin_fname[:-3]+'fits'
214
215 write_fits(fits_fname,'plc',cat)
216
217
218if HISTORIES:
219 pin_fname=f'pinocchio.{runflag}.histories.out'
220 print(f'Reading catalog {pin_fname}')
221
222 cat=rp.histories(pin_fname)
223
224 print(f'The catalog contains the following fields: {cat.data.dtype.names}')
225
226 fits_fname=pin_fname[:-3]+'fits'
227
228 write_fits_histories(fits_fname,cat)
229
230
231
232
Pinocchio2fits.create_fits_file
create_fits_file(output_file, column_data, column_names)

Pinocchio2fits.write_fits_histories
write_fits_histories(fname, cat)
Definition Pinocchio2fits.py:157
Pinocchio2fits.write_fits
write_fits(fname, cat_type, cat)
